User.title: User Profile
User.description: Information stored for each active user inside Arthur Luz e Som

avatar.description: Profile image url or empty string

telefone.description: Optional phone number in the format (xx) xxxxx-xxxx

nivelAcesso.description: User access level inside Arthur Luz e Som

cpf.description: User Document CPF with format xxx.xxx.xxx-xx

CompanyConfig.title: Company Configuration
CompanyConfig.description: General settings and metadata about the company/enterprise

nomeFantasia.description: Commercial / trading name of the company

razaoSocial.description: Company registration registered name - Razão Social

cnpj.description: Company document CNPJ formatting as xx.xxx.xxx/xxxx-xx

linkYoutube.description: Official company YouTube channel URL string

linkFacebook.description: Official company Facebook page URL string

CitiesConfig.title: Cálculo de Deslocamento
CitiesConfig.description: City base offset specifications for logistics, transport, staff, and djs

Equipment.title: Equipment
Equipment.description: Enterprise rental stock inventory containing prices, descriptions, and kits details

is_kit.description: Is combo of multiple equipment components

componentes.description: Item components list when is_kit is set to true

atualizado_em.description: Timestamp indicating last operation audit reference

Funcionario.title: Funcionário Técnico
Funcionario.description: Administrative staff listing describing daily fees and linked accounts

funcao.description: Role / job title inside the crew

diaria.description: Daily rental / escalation rate amount in BRL

ativo.description: Is this crew member currently active for event assignments

usuario_id.description: Optional linked system user account ID for personal dashboards credentials

Pacote.title: Configuração de Pacote
Pacote.description: Ready-to-book combo of technical equipments and resources for events

/funcionarios/{funcionarioId}.description: Administrative staff listing describing daily fees and linked accounts

/equipamentos/{equipamentoId}.description: Enterprise rental stock inventory and active kits

/pacotes/{pacoteId}.description: Ready-to-book packages and lighting/sound combo deals

/config/cidades.description: Logistics and city displacement pricing offset configurations
